name: LIVEPERSON INC
summary: PART I Overview LivePerson, Inc. (LivePerson, the Company, we, our or us) is a leader in digital customer conversation. Over the past two decades, consumers have made digital conversations their primary mode of communication with others. Since 1998, we have enabled meaningful connections between consumers and our customers through our platform and currently power nearly one billion conversational interactions each month.
